tools.name: search
tools.description: Search LMK products; returns citable results, each with a canonical LMK product-page URL. Use for shopping/discovery. For price/brand/on-sale filters, use search_catalog.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch full detail for one product by id (from a prior search result). Returns citable text with price, savings, 90-day price history, and buying options.

tools.name: search_catalog
tools.description: Search LMK's curated cross-merchant catalog. Returns products with LMK product-page links. Use for "find me X" shopping queries.

tools.name: lookup_catalog
tools.description: Batch-resolve products by LMK slug, id, or external/merchant id.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get a single product with full detail: enriched card, 90-day price stats (lowest/highest/average + is-at-lowest), and cross-merchant buying options.

tools.name: compare_prices
tools.description: Compare a product's price across merchants. Returns offers plus lowest/highest, all linking to the LMK product page.

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Get price history and stats for a product over a trailing window (default 90 days). LMK-proprietary price intelligence.

tools.name: get_deals
tools.description: Today's best deals, ranked by LMK's deal-quality scoring (discount depth, price sweet spot, merchant quality). Optionally filter by category slug or minimum discount.

tools.name: get_popular_products
tools.description: Most-wishlisted products (180-day demand signal across all LMK lists, aggregate counts only). Unique LMK demand data.

tools.name: get_trending_products
tools.description: Products gaining momentum — most-added to wishlists in the last 30 days (aggregate counts only).

tools.name: get_gift_ideas
tools.description: Gift recommendations for a recipient/occasion within a budget. Blends curated search with LMK demand signals.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List LMK's published editorial collections (occasions, holidays, beauty, style, sports).

tools.name: get_collection
tools.description: Get a single editorial collection and its curated products by slug.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
